tests.title: Quantitative Aptitude – Mock Test 1
tests.description: 30-question timed test covering arithmetic, algebra, and number systems.

tests.title: Logical Reasoning – Mock Test 1
tests.description: 25-question test on syllogisms, blood relations, and seating arrangements.

tests.title: Verbal Ability – Mock Test 1
tests.description: Reading comprehension, sentence correction, and vocabulary exercises.

tests.title: Full Aptitude – Grand Mock Test
tests.description: Comprehensive 60-question test covering all three aptitude sections.

studyMaterials.description: A comprehensive textbook containing all possible aptitude questions. (For reference, need not solve fully just try all question types)
